summary: SPET UI/UX Refinement Verification Complete (Iteration 48). Tested all critical flows after Toast POS-style visual changes. All features working correctly: TAP page 3-column grid, order panel qty badge layout, KDS ticket cards with color-coded headers and action buttons, Table page same improvements.

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI refinements verified, all interactions working

context_for_next_testing_agent: All Toast POS-style UI refinements verified working. Key items tested: TAP page 3-column menu grid (tiles are clickable, item added successfully to tab), order panel shows qty badge→name→price layout, KDS ticket cards have color-coded header bands (yellow=Pending, green=Ready, red=Delayed), timer section, qty badges on items, larger action buttons. Table page has same grid+order improvements. Theme toggle works on all pages.

details: ✅ Login with teste@teste.com / 12345 works
